subject: Fw: Fwd: minutes of 2/16/2006 meeting - final
body:
----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Mitch Webber <mwebber@law.harvard.edu>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Cc: dersh@law.harvard.edu
Sent: Tuesday, October 17, 2006 9:55:12 AM
Subject: Fwd: minutes of 2/16/2006 meeting - final


Mr. Epstein,

I think this is the final draft of the mintues from the February 16 meeting 
in Palm Beach.

Sincerely,
Mitch
